_comment_: FASE 11 / Tarea 11.1 — end-to-end smoke that exercises the four Foundry-pattern surfaces (Automate, Saga, Approval, Pipeline) on a live cluster. Designed to be runnable via `cargo run -p of-cli -- smoke run --scenario smoke/scenarios/foundry-pattern-full-flow.json --output smoke/results/foundry-pattern-full-flow.json` against a `helmfile -e dev apply` deployment. Audit-log assertions assume Debezium has connected and the EventRouter SMT is wired (FASE 2 / Tarea 2.4).

steps.name: fp_create_workflow_definition
steps._comment_: FASE 5 / Tarea 5.3 — workflow-automation Postgres state machine.

steps.name: fp_execute_workflow
steps._comment_: Drives the automation_runs row from `pending` to `running` via the saga.step.requested.v1 outbox event.

steps.name: fp_wait_workflow_completed
steps._comment_: Postgres state-machine row is the source of truth (no Temporal). Allow up to 30s for the consumer to drain the saga.step.requested.v1 partition + dispatch the no-op effect.

steps.name: fp_create_pipeline_with_cron
steps._comment_: FASE 3 / Tarea 3.4 — pipeline-build-service emits a SparkApplication CR. Cron dispatch is owned by the schedules-tick CronJob (FASE 3 / Tarea 3.5).

steps.name: fp_run_pipeline_now
steps._comment_: Bypasses the cron tick to materialise a SparkApplication CR immediately.

steps.name: fp_wait_pipeline_succeeded
steps._comment_: Spark Operator reconciles the CR into a driver Pod + executors. SUCCEEDED maps to spec.status.applicationState=COMPLETED.

steps.name: fp_request_approval
steps._comment_: FASE 7 — approvals-service 5-state machine + timeout sweep CronJob.

steps.name: fp_cleanup_saga
steps._comment_: FASE 6 — automation-operations saga runs LIFO compensation. We trigger the cleanup_workspace 3-step saga and assert it reaches `Completed`.

steps.name: fp_audit_log_visible
steps._comment_: Audit lands via outbox → Debezium → audit-compliance-service consumer. Assert the workflow run's correlation_id surfaces. ADR-0038 idempotency: re-querying must return the same row.
